steps.subject: {first_name}, your garage door springs may be due
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

I'm Tal with Goldman's Garage Door Repair, local here in {city}. I'm reaching out because homes built around {year_built} — like yours on {street} — are hitting the age where garage door springs start to fail.

Here's the deal: most torsion springs are rated for about 10,000 cycles. That's roughly 7-10 years of normal use. When they go, they go suddenly — loud bang, door won't open, and you're stuck.

We're running a $49 Spring Safety Check for homes in your area (normally $89). We'll inspect your springs, cables, rollers, and opener to see where things stand. If everything's fine, you're out $49 and you've got peace of mind.

Want to get ahead of it before something breaks? Just reply or call.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Re: Quick spring check for {street}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Just following up on the spring safety check for your place on {street}.

A quick way to tell if your springs are wearing out: stand in the garage, pull the emergency release, and try to lift the door by hand to about waist height. If it stays put, your springs are still balanced. If it drops or feels really heavy, they're losing tension.

Either way, our $49 check covers the full system — springs, cables, rollers, hinges, and opener. We'll tell you exactly what's wearing and what's still got life in it. No pressure to fix anything on the spot.

Worth 20 minutes to avoid a surprise breakdown?

Tal
{phone}

steps.subject: Last reminder from Goldman's, {first_name}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Last note from me — I won't keep bugging you. Just wanted to make sure the $49 spring check offer is on your radar for your place on {street}.

Garage door springs don't give much warning before they snap. Getting ahead of it is a lot cheaper (and less stressful) than an emergency call. The offer's good whenever you're ready.

Save my number for when it makes sense.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

notes: Send from MI number for MI leads, NC number for NC leads. Target homes built before 2011. {year_built} helps personalize the age-related pitch.
